fields.label: Default Language
fields.description: Controls the 'Default Language' setting in admin overrides.

fields.label: Default Currency Symbol
fields.description: Controls the 'Default Currency Symbol' setting in admin overrides.

fields.label: Support Link
fields.description: Controls the 'Support Link' setting in admin overrides.

fields.label: Invitation-only registration
fields.description: When enabled, new users are created only through a valid referral invitation link. Existing users continue to sign in normally.

fields.label: Disable bot menu
fields.description: Hide the in-bot user interface and /tg command. Renewal prompts open the Mini App.

fields.label: Required Channel ID
fields.description: Controls the 'Required Channel ID' setting in admin overrides.

fields.label: Required Channel Link
fields.description: Controls the 'Required Channel Link' setting in admin overrides.

fields.label: Public Mini App URL
fields.description: For example, https://app.example.com/.

fields.label: URL API Remnawave
fields.description: For example, https://panel.example.com/api.

fields.label: Remnawave API key
fields.description: Secret API key for the panel.

fields.label: Cookie API Remnawave
fields.description: Optional Cookie header for Remnawave API requests behind a reverse proxy.

fields.label: Panel API total timeout
fields.description: Maximum total time for one Remnawave API request, in seconds.

fields.label: Panel API connect timeout
fields.description: Maximum time to get or open a Remnawave API connection, in seconds.

fields.label: Panel API socket connect timeout
fields.description: Maximum TCP/TLS connection time for Remnawave API, in seconds.

fields.label: Panel API socket read timeout
fields.description: Maximum time to wait for response data from Remnawave API, in seconds.

fields.label: Remnawave webhook secret
fields.description: Set the secret in Remnawave Panel and paste the same value here to verify incoming panel webhooks.
fields.webhook_hint: Use this URL as WEBHOOK_URL in Remnawave Panel.

fields.label: Default Internal Squads
fields.description: Comma-separated UUIDs for the legacy mode without a JSON tariff catalog.

fields.label: Default External Squad
fields.description: Optional External Squad UUID for new users.

fields.label: Show subscription description
fields.description: Shows this text before the user chooses a purchase or renewal period.

fields.label: Subscription description (RU)
fields.description: Russian text shown during checkout.

fields.label: Subscription description (EN)
fields.description: English text shown during checkout.

fields.label: Payment provider request timeout
fields.description: Maximum total time for one payment provider API request, in seconds.

fields.label: Telegram Stars admin-only
fields.description: Shows Telegram Stars only to users from ADMIN_IDS. Payment callbacks remain active for admin test payments.

fields.label: Payment Methods Order
fields.description: Controls the 'Payment Methods Order' setting in admin overrides.

fields.label: Payment method ID
fields.description: See https://merchant.freekassa.net/settings/currencies

fields.label: Server IP
fields.description: Public IP address reported to FreeKassa.

fields.label: Trusted IPs
fields.description: Comma-separated IP addresses accepted for FreeKassa webhooks.

fields.label: Crypto webhook public key
fields.description: Optional. Falls back to WATA_PUBLIC_KEY or fetching the key from Wata.

fields.label: Invoice currency
fields.description: Fiat or crypto code (RUB, USD, USDT).

fields.label: Supported currencies
fields.description: Comma-separated invoice currencies allowed for Heleket in this shop. Heleket can reject unsupported codes per account/service.

fields.label: Target crypto
fields.description: Optional target cryptocurrency for conversion.

fields.label: Blockchain network
fields.description: Optional blockchain network code (tron, bsc, eth).

fields.label: Invoice lifetime (seconds)
fields.description: 300..43200; Heleket defaults to 3600.

fields.label: Trusted IPs
fields.description: Comma-separated IP addresses accepted for Heleket webhooks.

fields.description: Custom Russian text shown in the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: Only for admins
fields.description: Shows this payment method only to users from ADMIN_IDS. Webhooks and provider services remain active for admin test payments.

fields.label: API key
fields.description: PayKilla public HMAC key with INVOICE permission.

fields.label: Secret key
fields.description: PayKilla HMAC secret key. Never expose it client-side.

fields.label: Fallback invoice currency
fields.description: Currency used for PayKilla invoice creation when the tariff currency is not accepted by PayKilla as an invoice currency. Default: USD.

fields.label: PayKilla invoice currencies
fields.description: Comma-separated currencies accepted by PayKilla as invoice currency. Payments in other tariff currencies are converted to PAYKILLA_CURRENCY.

fields.label: Supported tariff currencies
fields.description: Comma-separated tariff/payment currencies that may use PayKilla. Unsupported PayKilla invoice currencies are converted before invoice creation.

fields.label: Accepted crypto tickers
fields.description: Comma-separated PayKilla tickers sent as paymentCurrencies. Default: USDTTRC,BTC,ETH,USDTBSC,USDTTON.

fields.label: Invoice type
fields.description: Optional override: FIAT_BASED, FIXED_AMOUNT, or OPEN_AMOUNT.

fields.label: Invoice lifetime (seconds)
fields.description: Used to send expiredAt to PayKilla.

fields.label: Request recvWindow (ms)
fields.description: Validity window for signed PayKilla API requests.

fields.label: Exchange rate URL
fields.description: No-key exchange rate endpoint used when tariff currency must be converted. Supports {source} and {target} placeholders.

fields.label: Exchange rate cache (seconds)
fields.description: How long PayKilla currency conversion rates and PayKilla limits are cached.

fields.label: Minimum payment amount
fields.description: Minimum payment amount accepted through PayKilla. The value is interpreted in PAYKILLA_MIN_PAYMENT_CURRENCY and converted for tariff currencies.

fields.label: Minimum payment currency
fields.description: Currency for PAYKILLA_MIN_PAYMENT_AMOUNT. Default: USD.

fields.label: Exact webhook URL
fields.description: Optional override for signature verification. Leave empty to use WEBHOOK_BASE_URL + /webhook/paykilla.

fields.label: Trusted IPs
fields.description: Optional comma-separated IP addresses accepted for PayKilla webhooks.

fields.label: WebApp button text (RU)
fields.description: Custom Russian text shown in the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: WebApp button text (EN)
fields.description: Custom English text shown in the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: WebApp button icon
fields.description: Lucide icon name rendered inside the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: Telegram button text (RU)
fields.description: Custom Russian text shown in Telegram bot payment buttons.

fields.label: Telegram button text (EN)
fields.description: Custom English text shown in Telegram bot payment buttons.

fields.label: Telegram button emoji
fields.description: Emoji prepended to the Telegram bot payment button when customized.

fields.label: Only for admins
fields.description: Shows this payment method only to users from ADMIN_IDS. Webhooks and provider services remain active for admin test payments.

fields.label: Secret key
fields.description: Signs outgoing API requests (HMAC-SHA256 in the Signature header).

fields.label: Webhook secret
fields.description: The shop's additional key used to verify webhook signatures. Leave empty to reuse the secret key.

fields.label: Payment link lifetime (minutes)
fields.description: 1..7200; leave empty for the LAVA default.

fields.label: Payment services filter
fields.description: Comma-separated LAVA pay services to show on the payment page (e.g. card,sbp). Empty shows everything enabled for the shop.

fields.description: Shows this payment method only to users from ADMIN_IDS. Webhooks and provider services remain active for admin test payments.

fields.label: API token
fields.description: Bearer token from the Pally API integrations page.

fields.label: Signature token
fields.description: Token used to verify postback MD5 signatures. Leave empty to use API token.

fields.label: Shop ID
fields.description: Pally shop identifier used by bills and Result URL postbacks.

fields.label: Bill lifetime (seconds)
fields.description: Optional Pally bill lifetime in seconds.

fields.label: Payer pays commission
fields.description: Sends payer_pays_commission=1 when enabled.

fields.label: Preselected payment method
fields.description: Optionally lock the hosted payment form to bank card or SBP.

fields.label: Payment page locale
fields.description: Optional payment form locale. Empty follows the user's language where possible.

fields.label: Payment form title
fields.description: Optional link name displayed on the Pally payment form.

fields.label: Public ID
fields.description: Public ID from the CloudPayments dashboard (HTTP Basic auth username).

fields.label: API secret
fields.description: API Secret from the CloudPayments dashboard. Used as the HTTP Basic auth password and to verify notification HMAC signatures.

fields.label: Recurring payments
fields.description: Allows CloudPayments token charges for subscription auto-renew. Requires Pay notifications with Token enabled in CloudPayments.

fields.label: Verify webhook signature
fields.description: Verify the Content-HMAC header on Pay/Fail notifications.

fields.label: Trusted IPs
fields.description: Optional comma-separated IP addresses accepted for CloudPayments webhooks.

fields.label: Only for admins
fields.description: Shows this payment method only to users from ADMIN_IDS. Webhooks and provider services remain active for admin test payments.

fields.label: Shop ID
fields.description: Overpay Shop ID (HTTP Basic auth username).

fields.label: Secret key
fields.description: Overpay Secret Key (HTTP Basic auth password). Also authenticates incoming webhooks.

fields.label: Checkout URL
fields.description: Base URL of the Overpay checkout (payment token) API.

fields.label: Gateway URL
fields.description: Base URL of the Overpay gateway API used for saved-token auto-renew charges.

fields.label: Payment page language
fields.description: Optional payment form language code (e.g. ru, en). Empty follows the user's language where possible.

fields.label: Test mode
fields.description: Sends test transactions to the Overpay sandbox.

fields.label: Recurring enabled
fields.description: Requests a saved card token on checkout and charges it for subscription auto-renew.

fields.label: Verify webhook auth
fields.description: Require incoming webhooks to carry the Shop ID / Secret Key HTTP Basic auth.

fields.label: Trusted webhook IPs
fields.description: Optional comma-separated allowlist of webhook source IPs.

fields.label: WebApp button text (RU)
fields.description: Custom Russian text shown in the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: WebApp button text (EN)
fields.description: Custom English text shown in the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: WebApp button icon
fields.description: Lucide icon name rendered inside the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: Telegram button text (RU)
fields.description: Custom Russian text shown in Telegram bot payment buttons.

fields.label: Telegram button text (EN)
fields.description: Custom English text shown in Telegram bot payment buttons.

fields.label: Telegram button emoji
fields.description: Emoji prepended to the Telegram bot payment button when customized.

fields.label: Only for admins
fields.description: Shows this payment method only to users from ADMIN_IDS. Webhooks and provider services remain active for admin test payments.

fields.label: Secret key
fields.description: Stripe secret API key used for Checkout Sessions and PaymentIntents.

fields.label: Webhook secret
fields.description: Stripe endpoint signing secret that starts with whsec_.

fields.label: Payment method types
fields.description: Comma-separated Checkout payment method types. Default: card.

fields.label: Supported currencies
fields.description: Optional comma-separated presentment currencies allowed for this Stripe account. Empty means no local filter.

fields.label: Recurring payments
fields.description: Save Checkout payment methods for off-session PaymentIntent auto-renewal.

fields.label: Verify webhook signature
fields.description: Verify the Stripe-Signature header using STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

fields.label: Webhook tolerance seconds
fields.description: Allowed clock skew for Stripe webhook signatures.

fields.label: WebApp button text (RU)
fields.description: Custom Russian text shown in the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: WebApp button text (EN)
fields.description: Custom English text shown in the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: WebApp button icon
fields.description: Lucide icon name rendered inside the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: Telegram button text (RU)
fields.description: Custom Russian text shown in Telegram bot payment buttons.

fields.label: Telegram button text (EN)
fields.description: Custom English text shown in Telegram bot payment buttons.

fields.label: Telegram button emoji
fields.description: Emoji prepended to the Telegram bot payment button when customized.

fields.label: Only for admins
fields.description: Shows this payment method only to users from ADMIN_IDS. Webhooks and provider services remain active for admin test payments.

fields.label: Subscription email notifications
fields.description: When enabled, subscription lifecycle notifications are mirrored to linked user email addresses.

fields.label: Torrent blocker notifications
fields.description: Notify local users when Remnawave confirms that their IP address was blocked.

fields.label: Telegram notifications
fields.description: Send torrent blocker notifications to linked Telegram accounts.

fields.label: Email notifications
fields.description: Mirror torrent blocker notifications to linked email addresses when SMTP is configured.

fields.label: Notification cooldown
fields.description: Minimum seconds between repeated torrent blocker notifications to the same user and channel. Exact webhook duplicates are always suppressed.

fields.label: Show blocked IP address
fields.description: Include the validated blocked IP address in the user notification. Disabled by default for privacy.

fields.label: Log administrator actions
fields.description: When disabled, events from users listed in ADMIN_IDS are not stored in message logs.

fields.label: Log Level
fields.description: DEBUG / INFO / WARNING / ERROR

fields.label: Support thread ID
fields.description: Log chat thread for support ticket notifications.

fields.label: QA email auth
fields.description: Expose email verification codes through the public auth API in development and test runtimes. Production email login still requires SMTP.

fields.label: Web App auth max age
fields.description: Maximum age of a Web App auth session, in seconds.

fields.label: Email magic link TTL
fields.description: Lifetime of one-time email login links and login tokens, in seconds.

fields.label: SMTP host
fields.description: SMTP server hostname. Email login turns on when host, port, username, password and from email are configured.

fields.label: SMTP port
fields.description: Primary SMTP port.

fields.label: SMTP fallback ports
fields.description: Comma-separated fallback ports tried after the primary port.

fields.label: SMTP timeout
fields.description: Network timeout for SMTP connections, in seconds.

fields.label: SMTP username
fields.description: Username used to authenticate with the SMTP server.

fields.label: SMTP password
fields.description: Password or API key used to authenticate with the SMTP server.

fields.label: From email
fields.description: Sender email address used for auth codes and notifications.

fields.label: From name
fields.description: Sender display name. Empty value falls back to the Web App title.

fields.label: SMTP STARTTLS
fields.description: Upgrade plain SMTP connections with STARTTLS when SSL is not used.

fields.label: SMTP SSL
fields.description: Use implicit TLS/SSL for SMTP connections, usually on port 465.

fields.label: Email code TTL
fields.description: How long email verification codes remain valid, in seconds.

fields.label: Email code resend cooldown
fields.description: Minimum delay before a user can request another email code.

fields.label: Email code max attempts
fields.description: Maximum verification attempts for one email code before it is rejected.

fields.label: Failed attempts before lockout
fields.description: Maximum failed email or promo code attempts within the throttle window.

fields.label: Brute-force window
fields.description: Rolling window used to count failed email and promo code attempts, in seconds.

fields.label: Brute-force lockout
fields.description: Temporary lockout duration after too many failed attempts, in seconds.

fields.label: Support tickets enabled
fields.description: Enable the support tickets section in the user account and allow users to create tickets.

fields.label: Admin email notifications
fields.description: When disabled, new tickets and user replies are sent only to Telegram and the log chat.

fields.label: Telegram notification cooldown
fields.description: Minimum seconds between repeated Telegram/log notifications for the same unread ticket.

fields.label: Email notification cooldown
fields.description: Minimum seconds between repeated email notifications for the same unread ticket.

fields.label: Max message length
fields.description: Maximum number of characters in a ticket message.

fields.label: Max subject length
fields.description: Maximum number of characters in a ticket subject.

fields.label: Ticket limit per hour
fields.description: How many new tickets a user can create per hour. 0 means unlimited.

fields.label: Backups enabled
fields.description: The worker periodically builds a ZIP archive and sends it to Telegram.

fields.label: Backup chat ID
fields.description: Where ZIP archives are sent. Falls back to LOG_CHAT_ID when empty.

fields.label: Backup thread ID
fields.description: Optional topic/thread ID. Falls back to LOG_THREAD_ID when empty.

fields.label: Backup period (sec.)
fields.description: Default is 3600: run on the hour boundary (12:00, 13:00, etc.).

fields.label: Archives to keep
fields.description: How many latest ZIP archives to keep in data/backups on the server.

fields.label: Include compose folder
fields.description: Adds a /app/compose-source snapshot. If the folder is not mounted, the DB backup is still created.

fields.label: Embedded install guides
fields.description: Open install instructions inside the Web App instead of an external connect page.

fields.label: Open install guides from bot
fields.description: Use the Telegram Mini App install screen for bot connect buttons and show public install guide links.

fields.label: Subscription link reissue
fields.description: Let users reissue (revoke and regenerate) their subscription link from the Web App. The new link and connection instructions are delivered by email, so configured email auth is required.

fields.label: Use Remnawave Panel config
fields.description: Fetch Subscription Page config from Remnawave Panel by the user's subscription short UUID.

fields.label: Enable admin JSON override
fields.description: Use the JSON field below instead of Remnawave Panel config. Disabled by default.

fields.label: Subscription Page config path
fields.description: Fallback path to a Remnawave Subscription Page v1 JSON config file.

fields.label: Subscription Page config JSON
fields.description: Optional admin JSON override. It is applied only when the JSON override switch is enabled.

fields.label: Traffic Packages
fields.description: Controls the 'Traffic Packages' setting in admin overrides.

fields.label: Trial premium traffic limit (GB)
fields.description: Separate premium traffic limit for trial subscriptions. 0 disables premium traffic enforcement.

fields.label: Trial Without Telegram
fields.description: If disabled, email-only users must link Telegram before activating a trial. Disposable email domains always require Telegram.

fields.label: Trial Internal Squads
fields.description: Comma-separated UUIDs. Uses USER_SQUAD_UUIDS when empty.

fields.label: Premium Internal Squads for trial
fields.description: Comma-separated premium internal squad UUIDs. Empty value disables premium squads for trials.

fields.label: First-payment referral bonuses only
fields.description: When enabled, later purchases by the same invited user do not grant referral bonuses to either side. The first successful payment still grants bonuses.

fields.label: Referral Welcome Bonus Without Telegram
fields.description: If disabled, email-only users must link Telegram before receiving the referral welcome bonus. Disposable email domains always require Telegram.

fields.label: Legacy ref links with user ID
fields.description: Accept old links like /start ref_<telegram_id>, where the payload contains the inviter's Telegram/user ID.

fields.label: Disposable Email Domains
fields.description: Comma-separated domains. Users without Telegram using these emails cannot claim trial or referral welcome bonus.

fields.label: Drop non-private Telegram updates
fields.description: Drops group/channel messages and callbacks before DB-backed middleware runs.

fields.label: Telegram anti-flood enabled
fields.description: Enables soft per-user limits for extreme Telegram update floods.

fields.label: Anti-flood window
fields.description: Rolling window, in seconds, used by all Telegram anti-flood buckets.

fields.label: All updates limit
fields.description: Maximum total Telegram updates from one actor during the window. 0 disables this bucket.

fields.label: Messages limit
fields.description: Maximum message updates from one actor during the window. 0 disables this bucket.

fields.label: Button callbacks limit
fields.description: Maximum callback-query updates from one actor during the window. 0 disables this bucket.

fields.label: Inline queries limit
fields.description: Maximum inline-query updates from one actor during the window. 0 disables this bucket.

fields.label: /start limit
fields.description: Maximum /start messages from one actor during the window. 0 disables this bucket.

fields.label: Expensive callbacks limit
fields.description: Maximum payment, trial, promo and account-changing callbacks from one actor during the window. 0 disables this bucket.

fields.label: Action cooldowns enabled
fields.description: Deduplicates repeated payment and trial button presses from the same user.

fields.label: Payment callback cooldown
fields.description: Seconds to suppress an exact repeated payment callback from the same user. 0 disables this cooldown.

fields.label: Trial callback cooldown
fields.description: Seconds to suppress an exact repeated trial activation callback from the same user. 0 disables this cooldown.

fields.label: Anonymous install analytics
fields.description: Sends one anonymous heartbeat per day (version, official/custom image marker, OS, locale, user-count range). No personal data, tokens or domains. Helps gauge active installs, versions in use and the share of modified builds. Toggling this off takes effect without a restart.

fields.label: Remnashop ref-code compatibility
fields.description: Allows old Remnashop referral codes to resolve without changing their case or format. The importer enables it automatically.

fields.label: Remnashop promo-code compatibility
fields.description: Looks up promo codes in the original case first, then falls back to the current rules. Regular promo codes keep working as before.

fields.label: Remnashop import date
fields.description: Operational marker for the latest Remnashop import, stored as an ISO timestamp.

fields.label: Remnashop import notes
fields.description: Short importer summary: migrated entities and enabled compatibility modes.
